file-integrity-monitoring.name: File Integrity Monitoring
file-integrity-monitoring.description: Detects unauthorized changes to critical system files, configurations, and binaries in real time or on a schedule.

crowdstrike.approach: Real-time kernel-level FIM with automatic baseline and change classification via Falcon FileVantage
crowdstrike.notes: Included in Falcon Insight XDR; FileVantage add-on for granular policies

sentinelone.approach: Agent-based FIM with Storyline context linking file changes to process trees

ms-defender.approach: FIM through Defender for Servers Plan 2 integrated with Azure Monitor Change Tracking
ms-defender.notes: Requires Azure Arc for non-Azure machines

trend-apex.approach: Deep Security agent provides real-time and scheduled FIM with rule-based policies
trend-apex.notes: Mature capability inherited from Deep Security

qualys.approach: Cloud agent-based FIM with continuous monitoring and compliance-mapped change alerts

tenable.approach: Agent-based FIM monitoring critical files with compliance template mappings
tenable.notes: Less granular than dedicated FIM tools

sophos.approach: Server-side FIM via Sophos Intercept X for Server with tamper protection

gaps: Limited correlation with broader threat context

ransomware-protection.name: Ransomware Protection
ransomware-protection.description: Prevents, detects, and responds to ransomware attacks including file encryption, MBR tampering, and extortion-based threats.

crowdstrike.approach: ML-based prevention with IOA behavioral detection and automated rollback via Falcon Prevent
crowdstrike.notes: CrowdScore provides real-time threat severity assessment

sentinelone.approach: Behavioral AI with automated rollback and ransomware warranty up to $1M
sentinelone.notes: Rollback restores encrypted files from VSS snapshots

ms-defender.approach: Controlled folder access plus cloud-delivered behavioral blocking and automated investigation
ms-defender.notes: Controlled Folder Access can cause app compatibility issues

cortex-xdr.approach: Behavioral threat protection with anti-ransomware module and local analysis via WildFire ML

sophos.approach: CryptoGuard intercepts file encryption in real time with automatic file rollback

bitdefender.approach: Multi-layer ransomware mitigation with vaccine, remediation, and automatic file restore

trend-apex.approach: Behavior monitoring with document protection and automatic file backup/restore

malwarebytes.approach: Ransomware rollback technology with behavioral detection for known and unknown strains
malwarebytes.notes: Better suited for SMB than enterprise

kaspersky.approach: System Watcher with automatic rollback and anti-cryptor for file servers

lateral-movement-detection.name: Lateral Movement Detection
lateral-movement-detection.description: Identifies attackers moving between systems within a network using stolen credentials, remote services, or exploitation.

crowdstrike.approach: Identity threat detection with Falcon Identity Threat Detection for lateral movement via compromised credentials
crowdstrike.notes: Formerly Preempt; covers AD-based lateral movement

sentinelone.approach: Storyline-based correlation of process chains across endpoints to detect multi-hop lateral movement

cortex-xdr.approach: Cross-endpoint causality analysis combining endpoint, network, and identity telemetry

darktrace.approach: Unsupervised ML models detect anomalous internal traffic patterns indicating lateral movement
darktrace.notes: Self-learning approach requires minimal tuning but needs baselining period

vectra.approach: AI-driven detection of lateral movement behaviors including RDP, SMB, and WMI abuse
vectra.notes: Strong in identity-based lateral movement detection

ms-defender.approach: Defender for Identity detects lateral movement via NTLM, Kerberos, and RDP anomalies in AD

zscaler.approach: Zero trust segmentation prevents lateral movement by enforcing identity-based micro-perimeters

credential-theft-detection.name: Credential Theft Detection
credential-theft-detection.description: Detects attempts to steal, dump, or forge credentials including LSASS dumping, Kerberoasting, token theft, and credential phishing.

crowdstrike.approach: Falcon Identity Threat Detection monitors credential stores and detects dumping, Kerberoasting, and golden ticket attacks

ms-defender.approach: Defender for Identity detects credential theft via LDAP, NTLM, and Kerberos protocol anomalies
ms-defender.notes: Best coverage for Active Directory credential attacks

cortex-xdr.approach: Credential theft prevention blocks LSASS access and detects Kerberoasting via behavioral analytics

sentinelone.approach: Behavioral detection of credential access techniques with Storyline correlation

cyberark-pam.approach: Credential vaulting and session isolation prevent credential exposure; PTA detects credential theft indicators

vectra.approach: Detects credential-based attacks including Kerberos manipulation and privilege abuse via network and identity signals

fileless-malware-detection.name: Fileless Malware Detection
fileless-malware-detection.description: Detects attacks that operate entirely in memory or abuse legitimate system tools (LOLBins) without writing traditional malware to disk.

crowdstrike.approach: Script control and behavioral IOAs detect PowerShell, WMI, and .NET-based fileless attacks in real time

sentinelone.approach: Behavioral AI engine monitors process behavior and script execution for fileless attack patterns

cortex-xdr.approach: Analytics-driven detection of fileless execution including script monitoring and AMSI integration

ms-defender.approach: AMSI integration plus memory scanning and behavioral monitoring of script interpreters
ms-defender.notes: Deep OS integration provides unique kernel-level visibility

carbon-black.approach: Continuous recording of endpoint activity with behavioral detection of living-off-the-land techniques

kaspersky.approach: Behavioral detection engine with memory scanning and exploit prevention for fileless attack chains

bitdefender.approach: HyperDetect ML layer with fileless attack defense monitoring script interpreters and process injection

behavioral-analysis.name: Behavioral Analysis / UEBA
behavioral-analysis.description: Uses machine learning and statistical models to baseline normal user and entity behavior and detect anomalies indicative of compromise or insider threat.

exabeam.approach: Purpose-built UEBA platform with Smart Timelines that stitch user sessions across data sources

splunk.approach: Splunk UBA add-on provides ML-based behavioral modeling on top of SIEM data
splunk.notes: Requires significant data volume for effective baselining

ms-sentinel.approach: Built-in UEBA with entity behavior pages and anomaly detection rules powered by Azure ML

crowdstrike.approach: Falcon Identity Threat Detection provides behavioral baselining for identity-related anomalies
crowdstrike.notes: Focused on identity behaviors, not general UEBA

darktrace.approach: Self-learning AI creates behavioral models for every device and user on the network

vectra.approach: AI-driven behavioral detection scoring entities by threat and certainty across network and cloud

cortex-xdr.approach: Behavioral analytics engine correlates endpoint, network, and cloud data with ML-based anomaly detection

gaps: Massive engineering effort for ML pipeline

memory-protection.name: Memory Protection
memory-protection.description: Prevents exploitation of memory vulnerabilities including buffer overflows, heap sprays, ROP chains, and process injection techniques.

crowdstrike.approach: Exploit blocking with memory scanning and process hollowing detection via kernel-level sensors

cortex-xdr.approach: Multi-method exploit prevention including ROP mitigation, JIT spraying prevention, and heap protection
cortex-xdr.notes: Traps heritage provides strong exploit prevention

sentinelone.approach: Behavioral AI detects process injection and memory manipulation techniques

ms-defender.approach: Exploit protection (EMET successor) with CFG, DEP, ASLR enforcement and attack surface reduction rules

bitdefender.approach: Advanced Anti-Exploit technology monitors memory allocation and process behavior for exploitation indicators

kaspersky.approach: Automatic Exploit Prevention monitors high-risk processes and blocks known exploitation techniques

process-monitoring.name: Process Monitoring
process-monitoring.description: Continuous visibility into process creation, parent-child relationships, command-line arguments, and process behavior across endpoints.

crowdstrike.approach: Kernel-level process telemetry with full process tree visibility and command-line recording

sentinelone.approach: Storyline technology auto-correlates process events into attack narratives with full process genealogy

cortex-xdr.approach: Causality chain analysis links process events across endpoints with full command-line visibility

carbon-black.approach: Continuous recording of all process activity with retroactive search and hash-based blocking

ms-defender.approach: Advanced hunting with process creation events, command-line logging, and timeline analysis

elastic-siem.approach: Elastic Agent captures process events with ECS-normalized fields for cross-platform process visibility

gaps: No automated correlation into attack stories

network-traffic-analysis.name: Network Traffic Analysis / NDR
network-traffic-analysis.description: Deep inspection and analysis of network traffic to detect threats, anomalies, and policy violations using signatures, ML, and protocol analysis.

darktrace.approach: Self-learning AI creates behavioral models for every device and connection, detecting novel threats without signatures
darktrace.notes: Autonomous Response can take action without human intervention

vectra.approach: AI-driven network detection with Cognito platform scoring threats by severity and certainty
vectra.notes: Strong cloud and SaaS traffic coverage

corelight.approach: Enterprise Zeek sensors with rich protocol metadata, encrypted traffic analysis, and Smart PCAP
corelight.notes: Gold standard for network evidence and forensics

cortex-xdr.approach: Network sensors integrated with endpoint and cloud telemetry for correlated threat detection
cortex-xdr.notes: Requires Palo Alto NGFW for full network visibility

ms-sentinel.approach: Network analytics via NSG flow logs, Azure Firewall logs, and third-party NDR integrations

dns-filtering.name: DNS Filtering & Protection
dns-filtering.description: Blocks malicious domains, prevents DNS-based data exfiltration, and provides visibility into DNS queries for threat detection.

zscaler.approach: Cloud-native DNS filtering as part of Zscaler Internet Access with advanced threat detection

cloudflare-zt.approach: Gateway DNS filtering with 1.1.1.1 resolver infrastructure and threat intelligence
cloudflare-zt.notes: Fastest DNS resolution with built-in security

netskope.approach: DNS filtering integrated with SASE platform for unified policy enforcement

darktrace.approach: Detects DNS tunneling and DGA domains through behavioral analysis of DNS query patterns
darktrace.notes: Detection-focused; relies on other tools for blocking

ssl-inspection.name: SSL/TLS Inspection
ssl-inspection.description: Decrypts and inspects encrypted traffic to detect threats hiding within HTTPS and other TLS-encrypted protocols.

zscaler.approach: Cloud-native TLS inspection at scale with unlimited capacity and certificate management
zscaler.notes: Inspects all ports and protocols, not just HTTPS

netskope.approach: Inline TLS decryption for cloud and web traffic with selective bypass policies

cloudflare-zt.approach: Gateway TLS inspection with selective decryption and do-not-inspect lists

f5-waf.approach: Hardware-accelerated SSL/TLS inspection with full protocol support and perfect forward secrecy

ddos-protection.name: DDoS Protection
ddos-protection.description: Mitigates distributed denial-of-service attacks at the network, transport, and application layers to maintain service availability.

cloudflare-waf.approach: 296 Tbps global network absorbs DDoS attacks with automatic detection and mitigation at the edge
cloudflare-waf.notes: Unmetered DDoS protection included in all plans

f5-waf.approach: Silverline DDoS Protection with cloud-based scrubbing and on-premises F5 BIG-IP for hybrid mitigation

zscaler.approach: Cloud-based DDoS protection as part of Zscaler Internet Access infrastructure
zscaler.notes: Primarily protects outbound; limited inbound DDoS for hosted apps

east-west-traffic-monitoring.name: East-West Traffic Monitoring
east-west-traffic-monitoring.description: Monitors internal network traffic between workloads, servers, and segments to detect lateral movement and internal threats.

darktrace.approach: Self-learning AI monitors all internal traffic patterns and detects deviations from normal east-west flows

vectra.approach: Network sensors deployed at strategic points capture and analyze east-west traffic with AI prioritization

corelight.approach: Enterprise Zeek sensors provide deep protocol logging for internal network segments
corelight.notes: Best for forensic-grade internal traffic evidence

sysdig.approach: Runtime network monitoring for container and Kubernetes east-west traffic with policy enforcement

prisma-cloud.approach: Cloud Network Analyzer visualizes and monitors east-west traffic in cloud VPCs

gaps: Scale challenges with high-volume internal traffic

network-segmentation-enforcement.name: Network Segmentation Enforcement
network-segmentation-enforcement.description: Enforces network segmentation policies through micro-segmentation, zero trust network controls, and software-defined perimeters.

zscaler.approach: Zero trust architecture eliminates lateral network access by brokering app-specific connections
zscaler.notes: Network segmentation through identity-based access rather than network controls

cloudflare-zt.approach: WARP-to-Tunnel connections enforce per-app segmentation without network-level access

netskope.approach: ZTNA-based segmentation with private access controls for internal applications

cisco-duo.approach: Duo Network Gateway provides identity-aware network access and segmentation

prisma-cloud.approach: Cloud Network Security enforces micro-segmentation policies across multi-cloud workloads

cloud-workload-protection.name: Cloud Workload Protection (CWPP)
cloud-workload-protection.description: Runtime protection for cloud workloads including VMs, containers, and serverless functions against threats and vulnerabilities.

wiz.approach: Agentless scanning of cloud workloads for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and exposed secrets via cloud API
wiz.notes: Agentless approach covers VMs without agent deployment

prisma-cloud.approach: Agent and agentless workload protection with runtime defense, vulnerability management, and compliance

sysdig.approach: Falco-based runtime detection with deep Linux kernel visibility for cloud workloads and containers
sysdig.notes: Strongest runtime detection for Linux workloads

aqua.approach: Runtime protection with drift prevention, behavioral profiling, and virtual patching for cloud workloads

crowdstrike.approach: Falcon Cloud Security extends EDR capabilities to cloud workloads with unified agent

ms-defender.approach: Defender for Cloud provides CWPP across Azure, AWS, and GCP with agentless and agent-based scanning

container-security.name: Container Security
container-security.description: Secures container images, registries, runtime environments, and orchestration platforms against vulnerabilities and threats.

sysdig.approach: Full container lifecycle security from image scanning to runtime detection with Falco-based runtime rules
sysdig.notes: Deepest runtime visibility using eBPF and syscall analysis

aqua.approach: End-to-end container security with image assurance, runtime protection, and drift prevention

prisma-cloud.approach: Twistlock-based container protection with image scanning, admission control, and runtime defense

snyk.approach: Developer-first container image scanning with base image recommendations and fix PRs
snyk.notes: Strongest in shift-left container scanning; limited runtime

wiz.approach: Agentless container scanning across registries and running containers with vulnerability prioritization
wiz.notes: Agentless approach for scanning; runtime sensor for detection

kubernetes-security.name: Kubernetes Security
kubernetes-security.description: Protects Kubernetes clusters including RBAC auditing, network policy enforcement, admission control, and runtime threat detection.

sysdig.approach: Deep Kubernetes integration with Falco-based runtime detection, network policies, and Kubernetes audit log analysis

aqua.approach: Kubernetes-native security with kube-bench, runtime policies, and Kubernetes Assurance policies

prisma-cloud.approach: Kubernetes protection with Defender DaemonSets, admission control, and CIS benchmark scanning

wiz.approach: Agentless Kubernetes security posture management with cluster misconfiguration detection
wiz.notes: Runtime sensor available for deeper visibility

snyk.approach: Kubernetes manifest scanning and IaC security for Helm charts and YAML configurations

infrastructure-as-code-scanning.name: Infrastructure as Code Scanning
infrastructure-as-code-scanning.description: Scans Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes manifests, and other IaC templates for security misconfigurations before deployment.

snyk.approach: Developer-friendly IaC scanning with IDE integration, PR checks, and fix suggestions for Terraform/CloudFormation/K8s
snyk.notes: Best developer experience with inline fix suggestions

prisma-cloud.approach: Checkov-based IaC scanning with 1000+ policies covering Terraform, CloudFormation, ARM, and Kubernetes
prisma-cloud.notes: Checkov is open-source under Prisma Cloud

wiz.approach: IaC scanning integrated with cloud security graph for contextual risk prioritization

aqua.approach: tfsec-based IaC scanning for Terraform with Trivy integration for comprehensive manifest analysis
aqua.notes: tfsec acquired and integrated into Trivy

cloud-misconfiguration-detection.name: Cloud Misconfiguration Detection (CSPM)
cloud-misconfiguration-detection.description: Continuously monitors cloud infrastructure for security misconfigurations, compliance violations, and best-practice deviations.

wiz.approach: Agentless cloud security graph connects misconfigurations to attack paths showing actual exploitability
wiz.notes: Security graph approach provides unique risk context

prisma-cloud.approach: Comprehensive CSPM with 1000+ out-of-box policies, auto-remediation, and multi-cloud compliance dashboards

ms-defender.approach: Defender for Cloud provides Secure Score and CSPM recommendations across Azure, AWS, and GCP
ms-defender.notes: Free tier available for basic CSPM in Azure

aqua.approach: CSPM with cloud asset inventory, compliance scanning, and drift detection
aqua.notes: Stronger in container/workload security than pure CSPM

vanta.approach: Automated compliance monitoring with continuous cloud configuration checks mapped to frameworks

drata.approach: Continuous compliance automation with cloud misconfiguration monitoring for SOC2, ISO, HIPAA

serverless-security.name: Serverless Security
serverless-security.description: Protects serverless functions (Lambda, Azure Functions, Cloud Functions) against vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and runtime threats.

prisma-cloud.approach: Serverless Defender wraps functions with runtime protection, vulnerability scanning, and compliance checks

aqua.approach: NanoEnforcer provides runtime protection for serverless functions with minimal performance impact

snyk.approach: Scans serverless function dependencies and configurations for vulnerabilities in CI/CD

wiz.approach: Agentless scanning of serverless function code and configurations with risk context

api-discovery.name: API Discovery & Security
api-discovery.description: Discovers, catalogs, and protects APIs including shadow APIs, zombie APIs, and API-specific attack detection.

salt-security.approach: AI-driven API discovery and threat detection using long-term behavioral analysis of API traffic

noname.approach: Out-of-band API security with discovery, posture management, runtime protection, and active testing

traceable.approach: Distributed tracing-based API security with deep request/response analysis and API catalog

cloudflare-waf.approach: API Gateway with discovery, schema validation, and sequence-based abuse detection

f5-waf.approach: Advanced WAF with API protection, bot defense, and OpenAPI schema enforcement

multi-factor-authentication.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
multi-factor-authentication.description: Requires multiple authentication factors (knowledge, possession, inherence) to verify user identity and prevent unauthorized access.

okta.approach: Adaptive MFA with push notifications, TOTP, FIDO2/WebAuthn, and risk-based step-up authentication

entra-id.approach: Microsoft Authenticator with passwordless, FIDO2, phone sign-in, and conditional access policies

cisco-duo.approach: Universal MFA with push, phone, SMS, hardware tokens, and Trusted Endpoints verification
cisco-duo.notes: Simplest deployment for legacy application MFA

ping-identity.approach: PingID MFA with adaptive policies, biometric authentication, and FIDO2 support

cyberark-pam.approach: MFA for privileged access with adaptive challenges and integration with leading MFA providers

single-sign-on.name: Single Sign-On
single-sign-on.description: Enables users to authenticate once and access multiple applications using federated identity protocols (SAML, OIDC, OAuth).

okta.approach: Universal SSO with 7000+ pre-built app integrations, SAML/OIDC support, and Okta Integration Network

entra-id.approach: Enterprise SSO with Azure AD App Gallery, SAML/OIDC, and seamless SSO for Microsoft apps

ping-identity.approach: Enterprise SSO with PingFederate supporting complex federation scenarios and legacy app SSO

cisco-duo.approach: Duo SSO provides cloud-hosted SAML IdP with MFA enforcement for all SSO applications

privileged-session-management.name: Privileged Session Management
privileged-session-management.description: Records, monitors, and controls privileged user sessions for critical systems with session isolation and just-in-time access.

cyberark-pam.approach: Privileged Session Manager isolates sessions through a secure proxy with full keystroke recording and video playback
cyberark-pam.notes: Market leader in PAM with deepest session management

beyondtrust.approach: Privileged Remote Access with session management, recording, and just-in-time privileged access

delinea.approach: Secret Server with session recording, monitoring, and proxy-based session management

secrets-management.name: Secrets Management
secrets-management.description: Centralized storage, rotation, and access control for secrets including API keys, database credentials, certificates, and tokens.

hashicorp-vault.approach: Dynamic secrets with automatic rotation, PKI, transit encryption, and identity-based access across multi-cloud
hashicorp-vault.notes: Industry standard for secrets management; open-source core available

cyberark-pam.approach: Conjur provides secrets management for DevOps and CI/CD with policy-based access control
cyberark-pam.notes: Conjur open-source available; CyberArk for enterprise

beyondtrust.approach: Password Safe provides automated credential management with checkout/checkin and session recording
beyondtrust.notes: Focused on traditional credential vaulting vs dynamic secrets

delinea.approach: DevOps Secrets Vault provides cloud-native secrets management for CI/CD pipelines

identity-governance.name: Identity Governance & Administration
identity-governance.description: Manages the identity lifecycle including provisioning, access reviews, role management, segregation of duties, and access certifications.

sailpoint.approach: AI-driven identity governance with access certifications, role mining, provisioning, and SoD enforcement

okta.approach: Okta Identity Governance with access certifications, lifecycle management, and entitlement management
okta.notes: Growing governance capabilities on top of IAM platform

entra-id.approach: Entra ID Governance with access reviews, entitlement management, lifecycle workflows, and PIM

ping-identity.approach: PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud with governance capabilities and workflow automation

zero-trust-access.name: Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA)
zero-trust-access.description: Replaces VPN with identity-and-context-aware access to specific applications, enforcing least privilege and continuous verification.

zscaler.approach: Zscaler Private Access provides user-to-app connections without network access, enforced through cloud-based broker
zscaler.notes: Largest ZTNA cloud with global edge locations

cloudflare-zt.approach: Cloudflare Access provides zero trust access through identity-aware proxy with device posture checks
cloudflare-zt.notes: Built on global anycast network for low latency

netskope.approach: Netskope Private Access provides ZTNA with client and clientless modes and continuous adaptive trust

cisco-duo.approach: Duo provides device trust verification and per-application access policies as ZTNA gateway

prisma-cloud.approach: Prisma Access provides ZTNA 2.0 with continuous trust verification and app-level segmentation
prisma-cloud.notes: Part of Palo Alto SASE platform

okta.approach: Okta provides identity-first zero trust with adaptive access policies and device context
okta.notes: Identity-layer ZTNA; requires network partner for full ZTNA

adaptive-authentication.name: Adaptive / Risk-Based Authentication
adaptive-authentication.description: Dynamically adjusts authentication requirements based on risk signals including location, device, behavior, and threat intelligence.

okta.approach: Adaptive MFA evaluates risk signals (device, location, behavior) to dynamically adjust authentication requirements

entra-id.approach: Conditional Access policies with risk-based sign-in evaluation using Identity Protection signals
entra-id.notes: Deep integration with Microsoft threat intelligence

ping-identity.approach: PingOne Risk service provides ML-based risk scoring for adaptive authentication decisions

cisco-duo.approach: Duo Risk-Based Authentication evaluates device health, location, and behavior for step-up decisions

data-loss-prevention.name: Data Loss Prevention
data-loss-prevention.description: Discovers, classifies, and protects sensitive data across endpoints, networks, cloud, and email to prevent unauthorized data exposure.

symantec-dlp.approach: Enterprise DLP with content-aware detection across endpoints, network, storage, and cloud with unified policy

forcepoint-dlp.approach: Risk-adaptive DLP that adjusts enforcement based on user risk score and data sensitivity

nightfall.approach: Cloud-native DLP with ML-based detection for SaaS apps, code repos, and messaging platforms
nightfall.notes: API-first approach; strong for cloud/SaaS DLP

code42.approach: Insider risk detection with file activity monitoring, Incydr for data exposure detection
code42.notes: Focused on insider risk vs traditional DLP blocking

netskope.approach: Inline and API-based DLP for cloud applications with exact data matching and ML classification

zscaler.approach: Cloud DLP inspecting all traffic including SSL with exact data matching and EDM

ms-cloud-apps.approach: Microsoft Purview DLP with unified policies across Microsoft 365, endpoints, and third-party cloud apps

email-threat-protection.name: Email Threat Protection
email-threat-protection.description: Detects and blocks email-borne threats including phishing, BEC, malware attachments, and credential harvesting attempts.

proofpoint.approach: Multi-layered email protection with URL defense, attachment sandboxing, and impostor detection for BEC
proofpoint.notes: Market leader in email security with deepest threat intelligence

mimecast.approach: Cloud email security with URL protection, attachment sandboxing, and impersonation protection

abnormal.approach: AI-native email security using behavioral analysis to detect socially-engineered attacks that bypass signatures

ms-defender.approach: Defender for Office 365 with Safe Links, Safe Attachments, and anti-phishing policies

phishing-simulation.name: Phishing Simulation & Security Awareness
phishing-simulation.description: Conducts simulated phishing campaigns and security awareness training to measure and improve user resilience against social engineering.

proofpoint.approach: Security Awareness Training with targeted phishing simulations, training modules, and reporting dashboards
proofpoint.notes: Integrated with Proofpoint email protection for targeted simulations

mimecast.approach: Awareness Training with phishing simulations, risk scoring, and gamified training content

encryption-at-rest.name: Encryption at Rest
encryption-at-rest.description: Encrypts data stored on disks, databases, file systems, and backups to protect against unauthorized physical or logical access.

symantec-dlp.approach: Symantec Endpoint Encryption provides full-disk and removable media encryption with centralized key management

ms-defender.approach: BitLocker management through Intune with compliance enforcement and recovery key management

hashicorp-vault.approach: Transit secrets engine provides encryption-as-a-service for application data encryption without key exposure

cloud-access-control.name: Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB)
cloud-access-control.description: Provides visibility and control over cloud application usage including shadow IT discovery, DLP, threat protection, and compliance.

netskope-casb.approach: Inline and API CASB with granular activity-level controls, cloud DLP, and threat protection for SaaS
netskope-casb.notes: Leader in CASB with deepest SaaS visibility

zscaler-casb.approach: Multimode CASB with inline and out-of-band protection for sanctioned and unsanctioned cloud apps

ms-cloud-apps.approach: Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps provides CASB with shadow IT discovery, session controls, and DLP

vulnerability-scanning.name: Vulnerability Scanning
vulnerability-scanning.description: Discovers and assesses security vulnerabilities across infrastructure, operating systems, and applications with risk-based prioritization.

tenable.approach: Nessus-powered vulnerability scanning with risk-based prioritization via Vulnerability Priority Rating (VPR)

qualys.approach: Cloud-based vulnerability management with TruRisk scoring, auto-prioritization, and virtual patching

rapid7.approach: InsightVM with live vulnerability assessment, real risk scoring, and remediation project tracking

wiz.approach: Agentless vulnerability scanning for cloud workloads with attack path context for prioritization

snyk.approach: Developer-first vulnerability scanning for code dependencies, containers, and IaC in CI/CD
snyk.notes: Focused on application/code vulnerabilities, not infrastructure

patch-management.name: Patch Management
patch-management.description: Automates the discovery, testing, and deployment of security patches across operating systems and third-party applications.

qualys.approach: Qualys Patch Management automates patch deployment prioritized by vulnerability severity and TruRisk
qualys.notes: Integrated with Qualys VMDR for scan-to-patch workflow

rapid7.approach: InsightConnect with patching workflows that automate remediation based on InsightVM vulnerability data
rapid7.notes: Orchestration-based patching rather than dedicated patch management

tenable.approach: Tenable integrates with patch management tools and provides patch prioritization via VPR scores
tenable.notes: Prioritization only; relies on third-party tools for deployment

compliance-monitoring.name: Compliance Monitoring & Automation
compliance-monitoring.description: Continuously monitors security controls against compliance frameworks and automates evidence collection, reporting, and audit preparation.

vanta.approach: Automated compliance platform with continuous monitoring, evidence collection, and auditor-ready reports for SOC2/ISO/HIPAA
vanta.notes: Fastest time-to-compliance for startups and mid-market

drata.approach: Continuous compliance automation with 75+ integrations, control testing, and personnel management

qualys.approach: Policy Compliance module with CIS benchmarks, custom policies, and regulatory compliance scanning
qualys.notes: Infrastructure compliance scanning vs GRC platform

prisma-cloud.approach: Cloud compliance dashboards with continuous monitoring against CIS, NIST, PCI, HIPAA frameworks

splunk.approach: Compliance reporting through Splunk Enterprise Security with pre-built compliance dashboards

penetration-testing-tools.name: Penetration Testing Tools
penetration-testing-tools.description: Automated and semi-automated tools for simulating real-world attacks to identify exploitable vulnerabilities and validate defenses.

rapid7.approach: Metasploit Pro provides automated penetration testing with exploit validation and reporting
rapid7.notes: Metasploit is the industry standard pen testing framework

tenable.approach: Nessus Expert includes external attack surface management and IaC scanning for pen test reconnaissance
tenable.notes: Reconnaissance tool, not full pen testing platform

attack-surface-management.name: Attack Surface Management
attack-surface-management.description: Continuously discovers and monitors an organization's external-facing assets including unknown/shadow IT, exposed services, and certificate issues.

tenable.approach: Tenable Attack Surface Management discovers unknown internet-facing assets with continuous monitoring

qualys.approach: CyberSecurity Asset Management with external attack surface discovery and risk assessment

rapid7.approach: Surface Command provides external asset discovery and attack surface visibility

wiz.approach: Cloud attack surface discovery with external exposure analysis connected to internal risk graph

recorded-future.approach: Attack surface intelligence with dark web monitoring and third-party risk assessment

web-application-scanning.name: Web Application Scanning
web-application-scanning.description: Automated scanning of web applications for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, injection flaws, authentication issues, and misconfigurations.

qualys.approach: Web Application Scanning with DAST capabilities, API scanning, and malware detection

rapid7.approach: InsightAppSec provides DAST with attack replay, remediation validation, and CI/CD integration

tenable.approach: Tenable Web App Scanning with authenticated and unauthenticated DAST and API scanning

snyk.approach: Snyk Code SAST and Snyk Open Source SCA provide application-layer vulnerability detection

siem-log-management.name: SIEM & Log Management
siem-log-management.description: Centralized collection, correlation, and analysis of security events and logs from across the environment for threat detection and investigation.

splunk.approach: Enterprise SIEM with flexible SPL query language, extensive app ecosystem, and Enterprise Security framework
splunk.notes: Most powerful search/query capabilities; high cost at scale

ms-sentinel.approach: Cloud-native SIEM with KQL query language, built-in UEBA, and pay-per-ingestion pricing on Azure

qradar.approach: Enterprise SIEM with offense-based workflow, built-in flow analysis, and customizable dashboards
qradar.notes: IBM divesting QRadar SIEM to Palo Alto

elastic-siem.approach: Open platform SIEM on Elasticsearch with detection rules, ML jobs, and timeline investigation
elastic-siem.notes: Open-source core available; best for organizations with Elastic experience

exabeam.approach: SIEM with Smart Timelines that auto-stitch user sessions and behavioral analytics for threat detection

logrhythm.approach: SIEM with embedded SOAR, case management, and compliance automation for mid-market

sumo-logic.approach: Cloud-native SIEM with log analytics, real-time alerting, and Cloud SIEM enterprise features
sumo-logic.notes: Cloud-native architecture; good for multi-cloud environments

security-orchestration.name: Security Orchestration, Automation & Response (SOAR)
security-orchestration.description: Automates security workflows, orchestrates tool integrations, and streamlines incident response with playbooks and case management.

splunk-soar.approach: Phantom-based SOAR with visual playbook builder, 300+ app integrations, and automated response actions

xsoar.approach: Cortex XSOAR with playbooks, war room collaboration, threat intel management, and 800+ integrations

tines.approach: No-code security automation platform with drag-and-drop story builder and flexible API integrations
tines.notes: Modern, API-first approach; community edition available

ms-sentinel.approach: Logic Apps-based SOAR capabilities built into Sentinel with automated response playbooks
ms-sentinel.notes: Native Azure integration; limited outside Azure ecosystem

incident-response-automation.name: Incident Response Automation
incident-response-automation.description: Automated containment, investigation, and remediation of security incidents including endpoint isolation, account lockout, and forensic collection.

crowdstrike.approach: Falcon Fusion automates response workflows with real-time containment, remediation, and notification actions

sentinelone.approach: Storyline Active Response with automated containment, rollback, and remote shell for investigation

cortex-xdr.approach: Automated investigation and response with root cause analysis and one-click remediation

splunk-soar.approach: Automated IR playbooks with multi-tool orchestration for investigation and response

xsoar.approach: Incident lifecycle management with automated triage, investigation, and response playbooks

tines.approach: Flexible automation stories for custom IR workflows with API-based tool integration

threat-intelligence-feeds.name: Threat Intelligence
threat-intelligence-feeds.description: Curated feeds and platforms providing indicators of compromise, threat actor profiles, TTPs, and strategic intelligence for proactive defense.

recorded-future.approach: AI-powered intelligence platform with broadest source coverage including dark web, OSINT, and technical feeds

mandiant.approach: Frontline intelligence from incident response engagements with threat actor attribution and campaign tracking
mandiant.notes: Now part of Google Cloud; deepest adversary intelligence

anomali.approach: ThreatStream platform with intel aggregation, enrichment, and distribution to security controls

threatconnect.approach: Threat intelligence platform with analytics, orchestration, and intel-driven security operations

crowdstrike.approach: Falcon Intelligence provides adversary profiles, IOCs, and sandbox analysis from CrowdStrike threat research

alert-triage.name: Alert Triage & Prioritization
alert-triage.description: AI/ML-assisted alert scoring, deduplication, and correlation to reduce alert fatigue and surface the most critical incidents.

splunk.approach: Risk-based alerting with risk scores assigned to entities, triggering alerts only when risk threshold exceeded
splunk.notes: Requires significant tuning for effective risk-based alerting

ms-sentinel.approach: Incident grouping and ML-based alert correlation with entity-based investigation graphs

exabeam.approach: Smart Timeline-based alert correlation that stitches alerts into user/entity behavioral sessions

cortex-xdr.approach: AI-driven alert grouping into incidents with automated root cause analysis and severity scoring

sentinelone.approach: Storyline correlation engine groups related alerts into unified incident views with automated severity

crowdstrike.approach: CrowdScore and AI-based alert triage with Falcon Complete managed triage option
